name: codex-proxy
description: Proxy between OpenAI Codex CLI and LLM backends (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini / Ask Sage)

codex-proxy.autoStart.description: Automatically start the proxy when VS Code opens.

codex-proxy.port.description: Port the proxy listens on. Configure Codex with OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://localhost:<port>.

codex-proxy.backendBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the LLM backend. For Ask Sage use https://sage.ask-sage.ai. The proxy derives provider-specific paths automatically.

codex-proxy.apiToken.description: Authentication token sent as Bearer to the backend. For Ask Sage: your personal API token. For OpenAI: your API key.

codex-proxy.openaiBaseUrl.description: Override for the OpenAI Chat Completions endpoint (leave blank to derive from backendBaseUrl).

codex-proxy.anthropicBaseUrl.description: Override for the Anthropic Messages endpoint (leave blank to derive from backendBaseUrl).

codex-proxy.geminiBaseUrl.description: Override for the Gemini endpoint (leave blank to derive from backendBaseUrl).

codex-proxy.defaultMaxTokens.description: Max tokens to request when the Codex request does not specify max_output_tokens.

codex-proxy.debug.description: Log full request/response bodies to the Output channel.
